text: TRUMP PRIMETIME ADDRESS 9PM ET: Will 'reaffirm' war ending in 2-3 weeks; strongly considering pulling US out of NATO over allies' refusal to join war; tells allies 'get your own oil'

sources.name: NPR — Trump to address nation on Iran war
NBC News — Trump considering pulling out of NATO

text: OIL CRASH ON PEACE SIGNALS: Brent plunges to ~$102/bbl (from $108), WTI dips below $100; war premium deflating on Trump exit talk; Goldman estimates $14-18/bbl geopolitical premium; May Brent expired at record $118.35

sources.name: CNBC — Oil prices fall on Trump exit signals
Fortune — Current price of oil April 1

text: IRAN SPLIT: Pezeshkian signals ceasefire openness ('necessary will to end war' if guarantees met); Mojtaba Khamenei contradicts: 'Hormuz leverage must continue, demand is continuation of defense'; IRGC silent on talks

sources.name: CNBC — Trump says Iran asked for ceasefire
France 24 — Mojtaba Khamenei vows continued support for Hezbollah

text: POPE LEO XIV CALLS FOR EASTER CEASEFIRE: 'I hope Trump is looking for an off-ramp'; Vatican says war 'does not meet conditions' for just war; Palm Sunday mass condemned those who 'wage war'

sources.name: Manila Times — Pope Leo calls for Easter ceasefire
Washington Post — Pope urges Easter end to war

text: IEA CHIEF: 'APRIL WILL BE MUCH WORSE THAN MARCH' — Oil supply crunch worsening; mulling second strategic reserves release; jet fuel/diesel shortages to hit Asia then Europe; BCA Research warns 'oil cliff mid-April'

sources.name: CNBC — IEA warns April worse than March

text: DAY 33 PM: Oil Brent ~$102/WTI ~$99 (crashing on peace signals); Trump 9PM address + NATO exit threat; Pezeshkian ceasefire vs Khamenei resistance split; Pope Easter ceasefire; IEA 'April worse'; Britain 35-nation Hormuz meeting tomorrow; gas $4.018; equipment losses mounting

FORMER IRAN FM KHARAZI SERIOUSLY INJURED, WIFE KILLED IN TEHRAN STRIKE: Was overseeing diplomatic back-channel with Pakistan for Vance-Iran meeting — strike seen as targeting Iran's diplomatic apparatus

sources.name: Al Arabiya — Former Iran FM seriously injured

text: PEZESHKIAN OPEN LETTER TO AMERICANS: 'Iranian people harbor no enmity toward other nations' — rejects unconditional surrender, calls war 'not serving US interests,' strongest ceasefire signal from Tehran yet

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Pezeshkian asks US public

text: EU EXTENDS IRAN SANCTIONS: 262 individuals + 53 entities hit with travel bans and asset freezes through April 2027; DOE issues 10M barrel emergency SPR exchange RFP

DAY 33 EVE: Gas $4.06 (AAA); Brent closing ~$101/WTI ~$103; Trump address 9PM ET tonight; Kharazi struck; Pezeshkian open letter; EU sanctions; 35-nation Hormuz meeting tomorrow; IEA 'April worse than March'; war premium fading on peace signals

IDF ELIMINATES IRGC QUDS FORCE ENGINEERING CHIEF: Mahdi Vafaei, head of Quds Force's Lebanon Corps engineering — responsible for Hezbollah tunnels for 20 years — killed in Israeli airstrike on Mahallat, Iran

TRUMP PRIME-TIME ADDRESS: Operation Epic Fury 'nearing completion' — war could end in 2-3 weeks; sets APRIL 6 DEADLINE for Iran to reopen Hormuz or face destruction of energy infrastructure including Kharg Island oil facilities

NETANYAHU PASSOVER 'TEN PLAGUES' SPEECH: Claims Israel inflicted 'ten plagues on Iran's axis of evil' — says nuclear and missile capability destroyed, Iran's trillion-dollar investment 'gone down the drain'
IRAN DENIES CEASEFIRE REQUEST: FM spokesman calls Trump's claim Iran 'begged' for ceasefire 'false and baseless' — Araghchi confirms message exchanges via Pakistan but says 'trust level at zero'

OIL SPIKES ON TRUMP SPEECH: Brent surges to $106.42 (+5%); WTI $104.21 (+4.1%) after Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard' — reverses earlier dip on peace hopes; April 6 energy deadline fears grip markets

DAY 33 NIGHT: Trump address sets April 6 deadline; Netanyahu 'Ten Plagues'; Iran denies ceasefire; Brent $106/WTI $104 spiking; Vafaei + Hajj Sadiq eliminated; 46 Hezbollah waves; IDF 400+ strikes; gas $4.06; UK Hormuz conference tomorrow
